cards.flavor_text: [i]A tragic battle often leave the lands unusable for decades, as the rotting corpse are followed by the grudge of all the dead left behind.[/i]

Army creature you control have vigilance.
cards.flavor_text: [i]None of them wished to fight. All of them are ready to die to protect their land.[/i]

Whenever this creature enters, exile another target creature until it leaves the battlefield.

• Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.
• Switch the power and toughness of each of up to two target creatures until end of turn.
